name: Episode Limit
overview: Stop playback after X episodes - perfect for falling asleep!
description: Adds a bedtime/moon button to the video player that lets you set how many episodes to play before automatically stopping playback. Perfect for neurodivergent users who rely on predictable routines, or anyone who wants to fall asleep to their favourite shows without them playing all night. Features quick-select buttons (1-5 episodes) and custom input up to 100.

versions.changelog: Initial release with in-player button and auto-setup
